name: CoAxon CardGuard
description: Transaction risk evaluation engine combined with off-chain IP threat filtering and on-chain verification via Base chain USDC. To subscribe to Enterprise API Key ($199/month), agents MUST first pass KYC pre-verification via POST https://api.coaxon.tech/v1/guard/agent-subscribe.

skills.name: Evaluate Transaction Risk
skills.description: Evaluate transaction risk across multiple dimensions (IP intel, BIN validation, Luhn check, amount patterns, GeoIP), returning allow/review/block decision and scoring rationale.

skills.name: Lookup IP Intelligence
skills.description: IP threat filtering and geolocation lookup: Tor exit nodes, anonymous VPNs, residential proxies, data center IPs, satellite providers, etc.

skills.name: Verify Agent for Subscription
skills.description: Pre-verify agent Web3 wallet authenticity or Whitelist status to unlock SaaS checkout URL ($199/month).

skills.name: Sense 402 Attempts
skills.description: Query the CardGuard Node Sensing Chain — inspect recent 402 rejection attempts and threat profiling statistics.

bearerApiKey.description: Enterprise API Key — prepaid / monthly subscription ($199/month). Agents MUST first pass KYC pre-verification via POST https://api.coaxon.tech/v1/guard/agent-subscribe or MCP tool verify_agent_for_subscription to unlock SaaS checkout link.

x402.description: HTTP 402 Payment Required — pay per call via Base chain USDC
